title: ASCII emoji and reactions
text: :) :D :( ;) <3 :P xD =) :') no way!! lol haha lmao bruh wait what omg fr cap nope yikes mood

tips.text: ASCII emoji = colon + paren or related
Speed comes from chunking — :) = one motion

tips.target: lol haha lmao bruh wait what omg fr cap nope yikes mood

character_tips.anna: ASCII emoticons predate emoji. Still everywhere in chat.
character_tips.maxim: Symbol clusters = chord-like motions. Train them as units.
character_tips.klavochka: Tiny faces made from punctuation, my dear 😊
